column1: # Local category overrides for Airwindows effects.
# Applied ONLY when upstream airwin2rack still has the effect as "Unclassified".
# When upstream adds a real category, ours is ignored — so pulling future airwin2rack
# updates automatically picks up canonical categorizations.
# Categories must match those used by upstream (Ambience, Amp Sims, Bass, Biquads,
# Brightness, Clipping, Consoles, Distortion, Dithers, Dynamics, Effects, Filter,
# Lo-Fi, Noise, Reverb, Saturation, Stereo, Subtlety, Tape, Tone Color, Utility,
# Rationale for each entry recorded in commit history.
